    Mousa Shaya

    ML Researcher & Pattern Recognition Consultant. 7 patents in deployed medical AI. BSEE/MSEE in Signal Processing. Independent researcher in automated lichen classification.

    • Acton, Massachusetts
    • LinkedIn
    • GitHub
    • Website
    • Email

    Consulting

    Shaya Software & Systems LLC

    I am available for consulting engagements where deep domain expertise, rigorous validation discipline, and production-grade systems thinking are valued.

    Areas of Expertise

    Medical ML & Biosignal Processing Decades of experience building clinical-grade pattern recognition systems. I understand the validation rigor, false positive/negative tradeoffs, and deployment realities that medical ML demands.

    Computer Vision & Image Classification Active research in species-level image classification using modern deep learning architectures including convolutional networks and multimodal fusion approaches.

    ML Systems Architecture Bridging the gap between ML models and production systems — data pipelines, model deployment, scalability, and monitoring.

    Pattern Recognition System Design Foundational expertise in signal decomposition, feature engineering, and classification under noise — applied to both classical and modern ML approaches.

    Why Work With Me

    • 7 patents in deployed medical pattern recognition systems
    • BSEE/MSEE in Communications Systems and Digital Signal Processing
    • 45+ years of software architecture and engineering experience
    • Active ML researcher in collaboration with Arizona State University
    • Development accelerated using Claude Code and modern AI tooling

    Contact
